briefdescription.para: This function will reset the driver's logging mechanism.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the xv_hdmirxss core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will insert an event in the driver's logginc mechanism.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRxSs core instance.
is the event type to log.
is the associated data for the event.

briefdescription.para: This function will read the last event from the log.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will print the entire log.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRxSs core instance.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 YH 17/08/16 Initial release. 1.01 MMO 03/01/17 Add compiler option(XV_HDMIRXSS_LOG_ENABLE) to enable Log 1.4 YH 07/07/17 Add new log type XV_HDMIRXSS_LOG_EVT_SETSTREAM_ERR 5.0 EB 16/01/18 Added new log XV_HDMIRXSS_LOG_EVT_PIX_REPEAT_ERR 23/01/18 Minor cleanup MMO 05/02/18 Added new log XV_HDMIRXSS_LOG_EVT_SYNCEST 5.4 EB 06/08/19 Added new log XV_HDMIRXSS_LOG_EVT_VICERROR
